heading: Today
text: Morning clouds, any showers, mostly in southern NH and north of Rt. 2 into Quebec. Some clearing through NY, Quebec, south to Rt. 2, then west of the Greens. Cloudy east and south. Highs ranging through the 70s. Winds light, becoming northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Clearing, except periods of clouds north, and a stray evening shower northeast. Patchy valley fog. Lows in the 50s. Winds northwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Patchy valley fog, some early clouds northeast, then sunshine, mixed with a few clouds. A stray, late-day shower far north. Highs in the 70s, near 80 in the warmer valleys. Winds light, becoming northwest up to 10 mph.
